50: Care to give it a try? Take a look around Archeo Alexandria, and if you find anything of value, I'll see you duly compensated!
Care to give it a try? Take a look around the ruins to the south, and if you find anything of value, I'll see you duly compensated!

51: There are amazing discoveries to be had in Archeo Alexandria─<Emphasis>if</Emphasis> you know where to look. Find something useful, and you'll be rewarded for your efforts.
There are amazing discoveries to be had in the ruins─<Emphasis>if</Emphasis> you know where to look. Find something useful, and you'll be rewarded for your efforts.
